## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed design

How should it work? Include any sketches, examples, or API shapes.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you dismiss them?

## Affected areas

Which parts of the codebase are likely to be involved?

- [ ] Runtime / config
- [ ] Agent / tools
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Memory / session search
- [ ] Adaptive routing / synthesis
- [ ] Gateway / channels
- [ ] TUI / Web client
- [ ] Other: ___

## Acceptance criteria

What would "done" look like?
